title: Bean Planet
description: a MOD that adds new ore,new friends , new weapons and new secrets
body:
Reminder:This mod is in very early beta so it might not get updates or be worked on for awhile.

https://mangird1.itch.io/beans-survival

so yeah don't expect updates 

THE BEAN PLANET MOD

It adds a cool new ore called copper which has the strength between stone and iron 

With copper you can make copper tools , copper helmet and chestplate , copper potatoes which are a good budget version of golden carrots , and the copper shovel known as the pathmaker useful for digging and making paths.

steel ingots which are used for mutliple guns

Some other stuff thats in the mod is:

music discs from beans the game and beans the game harder

new animal known as the rooster which are a good change of pace from the chickens since you can ride them and instead of dropping feathers they drop 2 raw chicken (they are also hostile if you kill them but we don't know if it works)

more food:copper potatoes as mentioned , tomatoes ,french fries with and without tomato dip

a lot of more structures

quality of life stuff:

craftable saddles

craftable enchanted golden apples

and more

this is mostly an explanation of the first version so it's outdated i won't update it because i don't care anymore this mod I made it mounths ago and forgot I'm sorry
